sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 57

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 57:1
items.html: (to the question) For Malchut, of the discernment of her own essence, was hidden away in RADLA [Reisha de-Lo Ityada, the unknowable head], and nothing of her is revealed but her illumination alone. Therefore she cannot be a complete discernment in Atzilut — even in the Partzuf of Malchut herself. (Item 72; and beginning "The Malchut")
